name: AI logo concept generator with brand research and Drive storage
description: Researches a brand or company using Exa, uses Claude AI to generate detailed logo design concepts and style guidelines based on brand analysis, saves the design brief to Google Drive, and sends a summary via Gmail.

source.originalName: Generate logos and images with consistent visual styles using Imagen 3.0

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for brand research

driveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for saving design briefs

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending the design brief

driveFolderId.description: Google Drive folder ID for saving design documents

designerEmail.description: Email address to send the logo design brief to

brandDescription.description: Brief description of the brand (e.g. 'B2B SaaS workflow automation platform')

designPreferences.description: Any design preferences (e.g. 'modern, minimalist, blue tones')

code.source:
var query = $.input.brandName + ' ' + $.input.brandDescription + ' brand visual identity logo design';
return { query: query };

steps.name: Research brand and competitor visuals with Exa
Build AI prompt for logo concept generation
Run Claude AI for logo concept generation
Upload design brief to Google Drive
Build email with design brief summary
Send design brief email via Gmail
